ADHELL可以BLOCK 廣告 咩原理

It uses Samsung KNOX SDK. Which has a KNOX Firewall that blocks all incoming trackers, ads, etc. So Adhell has tapped into that and is now making it system wide (entire phone) rather then the secure Samsung KNOX folders. And because it uses the already existing Samsung KNOX SDK that is running in the background of your phone anyways, the battery usage will remain roughly the same as before Adhell.
